site.title: Suture — Semantic Merge for Every Format
site.description: Automatically resolve merge conflicts in JSON, YAML, TOML, XML, CSV, and 12+ more structured file formats. Works as a Git merge driver — zero config after install.

pages.title: Suture — Semantic Merge Platform
pages.description: Stop fighting merge conflicts in config files. Suture understands JSON, YAML, TOML, XML, and 12+ more formats. Install in 5 seconds.

pages.title: Try Semantic Merge — Suture
pages.description: Interactive demo: paste two versions of a JSON, YAML, TOML, or CSV file and see them merge automatically. No signup required.

pages.title: Merge API — Suture
pages.description: REST API for semantic merge. Integrate structured file merging into your CI/CD pipeline, editor, or application.

pages.title: Pricing — Suture
pages.description: Free for individuals. $9/user/month for teams. $29/user/month for enterprise with SSO, audit log, and 99.99% SLA.

pages.title: Git Merge Driver Setup — Suture
pages.description: Install Suture as a Git merge driver in one command. Automatically resolves conflicts in JSON, YAML, TOML, XML, CSV files.
